---
title: "DDM_SRCR"
author: "Hyem"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

rm(list = ls())

library(dplyr); library(tidyr);library(readxl); library(tidyverse); library(TAM)
library(WrightMap); library(scaleAlign); library(patchwork); library(purrr)
library(ggplot2); library(ggforce)


################################# DDM Scored

file_path <- "C:/Users/Hyemi/Desktop/HYEM'S/PH.D/Codes/GPTOEtoMC/data"

score_abtest <- read_excel(file.path(file_path, "score_abtest.xlsx"), sheet = 1) %>%
  select(`Respondent Id`, `Assignment Id`, Score) %>%
  rename(`ABTest.01_MCOE` = Score)


score_sports <- read_excel(file.path(file_path, "score_sports.xlsx"), sheet = 1) %>%
  select(`Respondent Id`, `Assignment Id`, Score) %>%
  rename(`Sports.00_MCOE` = Score)

spring2024 <- read_excel(file.path(file_path, "Spring2024_DDM_FULL.xlsx"))

merged <- spring2024 %>%
  
  select(-Class, -ABTest.01_MCOE, -Sports.00_MCOE) %>%
  
  left_join(score_abtest, by = c("Respondent Id", "Assignment Id")) %>%
  left_join(score_sports, by = c("Respondent Id", "Assignment Id")) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ str_replace_all(., c("DDM0" = "0", "DDM1" = "1", 
                                                     "DDM2" = "2", "DDM3" = "3", 
                                                     "DDM4" = "4", "DDM5" = "5")))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ na_if(., "Not Included"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ na_if(., "-"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ na_if(., "No Scores"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ na_if(., "Not Reached"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ na_if(., "Blank"))) %>%

  mutate(across(-c(Activities), as.numeric))
  

merged

```


```{r}

item_cols <- setdiff(names(merged), c("Respondent Id", "Assignment Id", "Activities"))

# 각 Activities 그룹별로, 응답이 하나라도 존재하는 문항(column)을 추출
df_form <- merged %>%
  mutate(FormGroup = case_when(
    grepl("A1", Activities) ~ "A1",
    grepl("A2", Activities) ~ "A2",
    grepl("\\bB\\b|Br", Activities) ~ "B",
    grepl("\\bC\\b|Cr", Activities) ~ "C",
    grepl("\\bD\\b|Dr", Activities) ~ "D",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(FormGroup))

# long 변환 → 폼×아이템 포함여부 집계 → 5개 폼 모두 포함된 아이템만 추출
common_items <- df_form %>%
  select(FormGroup, all_of(item_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-FormGroup, names_to = "Item", values_to = "val") %>%
  mutate(included = !is.na(val) & val != "") %>%
  group_by(FormGroup, Item) %>%
  summarise(included = any(included), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(included) %>%
  count(Item, name = "n_forms") %>%
  filter(n_forms >= 4) %>%        # A1, A2, B, C, D 모두에 포함
  arrange(Item) %>%
  pull(Item)

print(common_items)


subset_data <- merged %>%
  select(
    matches("^(ABTest\\.00|ABTest\\.01|Sports\\.00|Sports\\.01)"),
    any_of(common_items)
  ) %>%
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~ !is.na(.x))) %>%
  select(order(colnames(.))) %>%
  relocate(ends_with("OE"), .after = last_col()) %>%
  filter(if_any(c(`ABTest.01_MCOE`, `Sports.00_MCOE`), ~ !is.na(.x))) %>%
  select(where(~ {
    if (all(is.na(.x))) {
      FALSE   # drop columns that are all NA
    } else {
      max(.x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
    }
  }))

print(subset_data)



```

## TAM

```{r, results='hide'}

IRTDF <- as.data.frame(subset_data)

for (i in 1:12){
IRTDF[,i] <- as.factor(IRTDF[,i])
}
for (i in 1:12) {
levels(IRTDF[,i]) <- 0:(length(table(IRTDF[,i]))-1)
}
for (i in 1:12){
IRTDF[,i] <- as.numeric(as.character(IRTDF[,i]))
}

#writexl::write_xlsx(IRTDF, "C:/Users/Hyemi/Desktop/New folder (2)/Spring2024_DDM_SUBSET.xlsx")


# Define Q-matrix for item-dimension mapping
Q <- cbind(c(rep(1, 10), rep(0, 2)), c(rep(0, 10), rep(1, 2)))
mod <- TAM::tam.mml(resp = IRTDF, irtmodel = "PCM", Q = Q)
summary(mod)
mod$xsi

threshO <- tam.threshold(mod, prob.lvl=0.5)
threshO_params <- threshO[, c("Cat1", "Cat2", "Cat3", "Cat4", "Cat5")]
threshO_params

mod$item_irt

    
```


```{r}

wle <- read_excel("C:/Users/Hyemi/Desktop/HYEM'S/PH.D/Codes/GPTOEtoMC/data/WLE.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(DIM1 = as.numeric(DIM1),
         DIM2 = as.numeric(DIM2))
correlation <- cor(wle$DIM1, wle$DIM2)

ggplot(wle, aes(x = DIM1, y = DIM2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Scatter Plot of WLE Scores (r = ", round(correlation, 3), ")"),
    x = "WLE Dimension 1",
    y = "WLE Dimension 2"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

```


## Align Person

```{r}

personO <- tam.wle(mod)
thetaO <- data.frame(personO$theta.Dim01, personO$theta.Dim02)
errorO <- data.frame(personO$error.Dim01, personO$error.Dim02)


original_means <- colMeans(thetaO, na.rm = TRUE)
original_sds <- apply(thetaO, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)



# Boxplot for original theta
personOL <- thetaO %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Dimension", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Dimension = recode(Dimension,
                            "personO.theta.Dim01" = "SR",
                            "personO.theta.Dim02" = "CR"))



personOL <- personOL %>%
  mutate(Dimension = factor(Dimension, levels = c("SR", "CR")))




# Create boxplots for thetaO and thetaA
ggplot(personOL, aes(x = Dimension, y = Value)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Original",
       x = "Dimension", 
       y = "WLE theta") +
  ylim(-3, 5.5) +  # Set y-axis limits
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")  # Center + bold
  )






#ggplot(thetaO, aes(x = personO.theta.Dim01, y = personO.theta.Dim02)) +
#  geom_point(color = "blue") +  # Scatter plot points in blue
#  labs(title = "SR vs. CR student locations (DCS)",
#       x = "WLE (SR)", 
#       y = "WLE (CR)") +
#  xlim(-4, 5) +  # Set x-axis range from -4 to 4
#  ylim(-4, 5) +  # Set y-axis range from -4 to 4
#  theme_minimal()


ggplot(thetaO, aes(x = personO.theta.Dim01, y = personO.theta.Dim02)) +
  geom_point(color = "blue") +  # Scatter plot points in blue
  labs(title = "SR vs. CR student locations (DCS) after DDA",
       x = "WLE (SR)", 
       y = "WLE (CR)") +
  xlim(-4, 4.5) +  # Set x-axis range from -4 to 4
  ylim(-4, 4) +  # Set y-axis range from -4 to 4
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")  # Center + bold
  )


cor(thetaO$personO.theta.Dim01, thetaO$personO.theta.Dim02, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

obs_corr <- cor(thetaA$personA.theta.Dim01, thetaA$personA.theta.Dim02, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
obs_corr
reli_dim1 <- 0.517 
reli_dim2 <- 0.541 
latent_corr <- obs_corr / sqrt(reli_dim1 * reli_dim2)
print(paste("Latent Correlation =", round(latent_corr, 3)))


```



## Alignment Item

```{r}

# Compare a few original and aligned parameters
item_names <- rownames(mod_aligned$xsi)
item_comparison <- data.frame(
  Items = item_names,
  Original = mod$xsi$xsi,
  Aligned = mod_aligned$xsi$xsi,
  Dimension = ifelse(grepl("OE", item_names), 2, 1)
)
print(item_comparison)



# Visualize the item difficulties before and after alignment
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(item_comparison, aes(x = Original, y = Aligned, color = factor(Dimension))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  labs(title = "Item Difficulties: Original vs Aligned",
       x = "Original Difficulty",
       y = "Aligned Difficulty",
       color = "Dimension") +
  theme_minimal()


```



### WrightMap Reorder


```{r}

# Define desired item order
desired_order <- c(
  "Delivery.00ab_MC", "Delivery.00abc_OE",
  "Travel.00ab_MC", "Travel.00abc_OE",
  "Elevator.00ab_MC", "Elevator.00abc_OE",
  "Market.00ab_MC", "Market.00abc_OE",
  "Market.01abc_MC", "Market.01abc_OE",
  "Elevator.02abc_MC", "Elevator.02abc_OE",
  "Delivery.04abc_MCMCMC", "Market.02b_FB", "Shipping.01_NU", "Shipping.03abc_MCMCME"
)

score_categories <- setNames(
  lapply(data1[desired_order], function(col) sort(unique(col), na.last = TRUE)),
  desired_order
)

# Function to relocate step difficulties to original score locations
relocate_steps <- function(step_params, original_scores) {
    # Ensure original scores are numeric and sorted
    sorted_scores <- sort(original_scores, na.last = TRUE)
    
    # Check if sorted_scores is empty or contains only NAs
    if (length(sorted_scores) == 0 || all(is.na(sorted_scores))) {
        warning("original_scores is empty or contains only NA values.")
        return(rep(NA, length(step_params)))  # Return an NA vector of the same length as step_params
    }

    # Compute max safely
    max_score <- max(sorted_scores, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Ensure max_score is a valid numeric value
    if (is.na(max_score) || max_score <= 0) {
        warning("Invalid max value in sorted_scores. Returning NA vector.")
        return(rep(NA, length(step_params)))
    }

    # Initialize a vector of NAs for the full score range
    relocated_params <- rep(NA, max_score)

    # Assign the step difficulties to the correct indices
    for (i in seq_along(step_params)) {
        if (!is.na(sorted_scores[i + 1])) {
            relocated_params[sorted_scores[i + 1]] <- step_params[i]
        }
    }
    return(relocated_params)
}


threshA_params <- threshA_params[desired_order, , drop = FALSE]
mod_aligned$item <- mod_aligned$item[match(desired_order, mod_aligned$item$item), ]


# Step 4: Relocate step difficulties with names

relocated_params <- list()
for (i in seq_along(score_categories)) {
    item_scores <- score_categories[[i]]  # Get original score locations
    item_steps <- threshA_params[i, !is.na(threshA_params[i, ])]  # Get step parameters
    
    # Ensure step_params exist before relocating
    if (length(item_steps) > 0) {
        relocated_params[[i]] <- relocate_steps(item_steps, item_scores)
    } else {
        relocated_params[[i]] <- NA
    }
}

max_steps <- max(sapply(relocated_params, length))
item_difficulty_table <- data.frame(
  Item = names(score_categories),  # Use item names
  Overall_Difficulty =  mod_aligned$item$xsi.item
)
# Add step difficulties as separate columns
for (i in 1:max_steps) {
  item_difficulty_table[[paste0("threshold", i)]] <- sapply(relocated_params, function(x) if (length(x) >= i) x[i] else NA)
}

print(item_difficulty_table)



# Convert the list of relocated step difficulties into a matrix
step_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(relocated_params), ncol = max_steps)
for (i in seq_along(relocated_params)) {
  step_matrix[i, 1:length(relocated_params[[i]])] <- relocated_params[[i]]
}

rownames(step_matrix) <- names(score_categories) %>%
  sort() %>%
  str_remove("^item\\d+")  # Remove "item" prefix 


# Create numerical labels for items
item_labels <- names(score_categories)  # Original item names
num_labels <- seq_along(item_labels)    # Generate numeric labels

# Adjust margins to create space for the legend
windows(width = 20, height = 8)  # Use quartz() for Mac or X11() for Linux


png("C:/HYEM'S/PH.D/PH.D PROJECTS/NCME25_SRCR Comparison Study/SRCR_Report_4.19/data1.png",
    width = 1500, height = 1000, res = 150)

wrightMap(
  thetas = thetaA,
  thresholds = step_matrix,
  label.items = num_labels,
  label.persons = TRUE,
  ylim = c(-6, 6)
)

dev.flush()
dev.off()

# Optional: Print legend for clarity
cat("Item Legend:\n", paste(num_labels, ":", desired_order, collapse = "\n"))


```

```{r}
png("C:/HYEM'S/PH.D/PH.D PROJECTS/NCME25_SRCR Comparison Study/SRCR_Report_4.19/threshold_plot_enhanced.png", 
    width = 2200, height = 1500, res = 200)

par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 5))  # 오른쪽 여백 확보

plot(NULL, xlim = c(0.5, 12.5), ylim = c(-3, 4),
     xlab = "Item Number", ylab = "Logit Scale",
     xaxt = "n", main = "Wright Map with Threshold Averages and Labels")

axis(1, at = 1:12)

# 문항 및 차원 정보
item_number <- 1:12
dimension <- ifelse(item_number %% 2 == 1, "SR", "CR")

# 문항별 threshold 점 찍기 + 숫자 표시
for (i in 1:12) {
  for (k in 1:4) {
    val <- step_matrix[i, k]
    if (!is.na(val)) {
      col_point <- ifelse(dimension[i] == "SR", "blue", "red")
      points(i, val, pch = 18, col = col_point)
      text(i, val + 0.15, labels = k, cex = 0.75, col = col_point)
    }
  }
}

# threshold 평균선 스타일
colors <- c("T1" = "orange", "T2" = "blue", "T3" = "darkgreen", "T4" = "purple")
linetypes <- c("SR" = 1, "CR" = 2)

# 선 그리기 및 텍스트 라벨
for (k in 1:4) {
  t_label <- paste0("T", k)
  color <- colors[[t_label]]
  
  for (dim in c("SR", "CR")) {
    idx <- if (dim == "SR") seq(1, 11, by = 2) else seq(2, 12, by = 2)
    mean_val <- mean(step_matrix[idx, k], na.rm = TRUE)
    
    abline(h = mean_val, col = color, lty = linetypes[[dim]], lwd = 2)
    
    # 위치 조정
    text_x <- if (dim == "SR") 12.6 else 0.4
    offset_y <- if (dim == "SR") 0.15 else -0.2  # SR: 아래로, CR: 위로

    text(text_x, mean_val + offset_y, labels = paste0(dim, "-T", k),
         col = color, cex = 0.85, font = 2)
  }
}

dev.off()


```


```{r}

# 문항 인덱스 정의
sr_idx <- seq(1, 11, by = 2)  # SR 문항은 홀수 번호
cr_idx <- seq(2, 12, by = 2)  # CR 문항은 바로 다음 짝수 번호

# threshold level 별 평균 계산
sr_means <- colMeans(step_matrix[sr_idx, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
cr_means <- colMeans(step_matrix[cr_idx, , drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)

# 차이 계산
threshold_diff <- cr_means - sr_means

# 결과 정리
threshold_level <- paste0("T", seq_along(threshold_diff))
threshold_gap_summary <- data.frame(
  Threshold_Level = threshold_level,
  SR_Mean = round(sr_means, 3),
  CR_Mean = round(cr_means, 3),
  CR_minus_SR = round(threshold_diff, 3)
)

# 출력
print(threshold_gap_summary)

```


### Scatter Plot with SE OVERALL DIFFICULTY

```{r}

xsi_df <- mod_aligned$xsi 
xsi_df$se.xsi <- mod$xsi$se.xsi
xsi_df$item <- rownames(xsi_df)

base_items <- c("Delivery.00", "Travel.00", "Elevator.00", "Market.00", "Market.01", "Elevator.02")


# long-format으로 SR/CR step parameter 필터링
overall_df <- xsi_df %>%
  filter(!grepl("_step", item)) %>%
  mutate(
    root = gsub("(\\d+)[a-zA-Z]+", "\\1", gsub("_.*$", "", item)),
    type = case_when(
      grepl("_MC", item) ~ "SR",
      grepl("_OE", item) ~ "CR")
  ) %>%
  filter(root %in% base_items) %>%
  select(root, xsi, se.xsi, type)


# wide format으로 변환: SR과 CR step을 같은 row에 매칭
plotoverall_df <- overall_df %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = root,
    names_from = type,
    values_from = c(xsi, se.xsi)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(xsi_SR, xsi_CR) %>%
  mutate(
    radius_x = 2 * se.xsi_SR,  # 95% CI 반지름 (SR 기준)
    radius_y = 2 * se.xsi_CR   # 95% CI 반지름 (CR 기준)
  )

# 시각화
ggplot(plotoverall_df, aes(x = xsi_SR, y = xsi_CR)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  # y = x 기준선
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = root), vjust = -1.2, size = 3.5) +
  geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = xsi_SR, y0 = xsi_CR, a = radius_x, b = radius_y, angle = 0),
               alpha = 0.2, fill = "pink", color = NA) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-0.2, 2), ylim = c(-0.1, 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Overall Difficulty: SR vs CR with 95% CI",
    x = "SR Overall Difficulty",
    y = "CR Overall Difficulty"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```





### Scatter Plot with SE STEP DIFFICULTY

```{r}

xsi_df <- mod_aligned$xsi 
xsi_df$se.xsi <- mod$xsi$se.xsi
xsi_df$item <- rownames(xsi_df)

base_items <- c("Market.00","Elevator.00","Elevator.02")


# long-format으로 SR/CR step parameter 필터링
step_df <- xsi_df %>%
  filter(grepl("_step", item)) %>%
  mutate(
    root = gsub("(\\d+)[a-zA-Z]+", "\\1", gsub("_.*$", "", item)),
    type = case_when(
      grepl("_MC_step", item) ~ "SR",
      grepl("_OE_step", item) ~ "CR"),
    step = as.integer(gsub(".*step", "", item))
  ) %>%
  filter(root %in% base_items) %>%
  select(root, xsi, se.xsi, type, step)


# wide format으로 변환: SR과 CR step을 같은 row에 매칭
plot_df <- step_df %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(root, step),
    names_from = type,
    values_from = c(xsi, se.xsi)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(xsi_SR, xsi_CR) %>%
  mutate(
    radius_x = 2 * se.xsi_SR,  # 95% CI 반지름 (가로)
    radius_y = 2 * se.xsi_CR   # 95% CI 반지름 (세로)
  )


ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = xsi_SR, y = xsi_CR)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "black", size = 0.5) +  # y = x 기준선
  #geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(root, "_s", step)), vjust = -1.2, size = 3.5) +
  geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = xsi_SR, y0 = xsi_CR, a = radius_x, b = radius_y, angle = 0),
               alpha = 0.2, fill = "pink", color = NA) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(-4.5, 4), ylim = c(-4.5, 4)) +
  labs(
    title = "Step Parameters: SR vs CR with 95% CI",
    x = "SR Step Difficulty",
    y = "CR Step Difficulty"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
